9 - Section 5.2.mp4
Welcome back to Section 5, 5. 2, Creating Your Niche Tagline. If you don't have this downloaded, go get your one-page and attack and conquer plan. We're going to continue to fill this out. So let's get into it. In the example of the digital agency I had, the niche tagline for me was 'digital results marketing'. That rolled back into my. who the market leader in digital results marketing for Fortune 2000 companies. But think about your niche tagline—is this is what goes underneath your logo? This is the... Nano-second you meet somebody, whether it's a digital business card, it's an email signature, it's on social, it's on your website, that they quickly understand. What you do. Think this has to be direct. So it's a no-brainer.
Somebody meets you at a party, a networking event, and they immediately go, 'Oh.' These guys do marketing, they deliver results, and they do it via digital. That's what this says. So if you are a video editor, right? Or, you know, whatever you're doing, Jay's behind the camera here, right? So he does post editing. So Jay should have a tagline, you know, the market leader in post editing production or whatever that is, be specific. Be in your niche and be direct, right? So I want everybody to take. 10, 15 minutes, do not overthink this. You have already now, you should have already filled out your who, what, and why, which should clearly start to position you in your niche and your market leader positioning. And from that now, you should be able to extract out a powerful direct statement that clearly communicates what you do.
